summary: Completed testing of SoulNutri Admin Panel after R2 migration. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical features working - thumbnails from R2, edit modal with gallery, tabs navigation, search/filter.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ R2 integration working correctly - images served from Cloudflare R2
✓ Thumbnails compressed correctly (thumb=1 parameter) - ~12KB vs full size
✓ Admin panel loads 196 dishes with 3939 total images
✓ AI index shows 189 dishes with 1632 embeddings (ready=true)
✓ Edit modal displays gallery with all dish images (39 images for Abobora ao Curry)
✓ Search/filter works correctly (7 dishes found for 'arroz')
✓ All tabs clickable: Pratos, Auditoria, Novidades, Premium, Custos API, Metricas, Upload Fotos, Moderação
✓ Move dropdown uses SELECT element (not text input)
✓ Inline notification system working (no alert/confirm/prompt calls)
NOTE: Admin panel has NO authentication - credentials in test_credentials.md are not used
context_for_next_testing_agent: R2 migration validated successfully. All images served from Cloudflare R2 with thumbnail compression. Admin panel fully functional without authentication.

admin_page_load.details: 196 dishes displayed with thumbnails loading from R2

thumbnails_r2.details: thumb=1 parameter compresses images (~12KB for thumbnails vs larger full images)

edit_modal_gallery.details: Modal shows all dish images (39 images for Abobora ao Curry)

api_admin_dishes.details: GET /api/admin/dishes returns 196 dishes with correct total

api_dish_images_list.details: GET /api/admin/dish-images-list/{slug} returns list of image filenames

stats_display.details: Stats bar shows: 189 PRATOS, 1632 IMAGENS IA, 196 TOTAL PRATOS, 3939 TOTAL FOTOS

admin_login.details: Admin panel has NO authentication - open access. Credentials in test_credentials.md are not implemented.

test_credentials.note: These credentials are NOT used - admin panel has no authentication
